Bellows.description: Taking air-type attack damage grants a stack of Bellows (+25% fire move damage per stack, max 4). Loses 1 stack at end of turn.

Anti-Gravity.description: Debuffs have a 50% chance to clear each turn they tick down

Capricious.description: Cannot use the same move twice in a row; picks randomly among remaining usable moves

Cavalier.description: Attacking stats cannot be buffed or debuffed by moves

Extendo.description: Physical moves have +1 range, but not through impassable terrain

Flippant.description: Super effective attacks against this unit have decreased accuracy and increased damage

Glib.description: Bonus if target's special is lower, penalty if higher

Impetuous.description: +20% damage on first attack each turn, -10% for each attack after

Impulsive.description: First attack each turn gains +20% accuracy. Enemy attacks gain +20% accuracy against this unit

Jury Rig.description: Heals adjacent robo-type allies at the start of each turn

Low Profile.description: Harder to target at range; ranged attacks have reduced accuracy

Maximum.description: Status effects cannot lower this unit's stats below base values

Protector.description: Ranged attacks hit this unit instead of units directly behind it

Reliable.description: Massive accuracy boost, effectively guaranteeing hits

Stellar.description: Grants the Maximum effect to all allied units within 2 tiles

Zone Control.description: Enemies suffer movement and accuracy penalties within 3 tiles; allies are buffed
